focus: Validate the complete seven-row oracle matrix for MR-001..003, IL-001..003, and proposed DA-R01.
noveltyJustification: 2 of 5 findings were fully new and 3 partially new (0.70), plus a 0.10 simplicity bonus for isolating the remaining loader and manifest gates.
keyQuestions: Is the seven-row proposed seed mode-complete and oracle-valid as a set, and what preconditions or blockers remain?
answeredQuestions: The seed is statically mode-complete and cap-valid but is not executable-oracle-valid until indexed typed gold and DA-R01 are loader-reachable and the generated manifest verifies every pair.
ruledOut: Mode completeness alone proves oracle validity
Off-index DA-R01 YAML is discovered by the indexed hub loader
The selected-map cap limits leaf count
Packet prefixes belong inside canonical leaf_resource_id

label: Seven rows cover all seven registry modes with one mode per row and stay below the two-mode cap.
The indexed hub loader cannot preserve a system-deep-loop workflow-mode prefix through extractPaths, so the six existing rows cannot derive typed gold.
An off-index DA-R01 YAML fixture is ignored by the hub index branch, while indexed files are parsed without typed frontmatter.
Canonical typed identity is workflowMode plus child-local leafResourceId; packet prefixes remain outside leafResourceId.
No committed hub leaf-manifest.json exists, so manifest membership remains an implementation-time gate.

direction: Treat mode completeness as executable oracle validity
reason: Loader reachability, authored gold, and manifest membership are independent prerequisites.
